results.rendered_html: vaibhava (von vibhu) n. Macht, Wirksamkeit; hohe Stellung: mahatāṃ hi dhairyamavicintyavaibhavam  KIR. 12,3 .  Spr. (II) 2426 , v. l. vitaraṇaṃ (acc.) vinā vaibhavam (nom.) 2792 . (I) 4946 .  KATHĀS. 21,60 . nijavaibhavocitaṃ vivāhasaṃbhāravidhim 34,249 . 66,191 . vīrāṇāṃ vaidyutaṃ vaibhavam  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 117,a,25 . 238,b,4 .  BHĀG. P. 5,18,11 . 10,14,38 . 34,19 . 12,10,39 . utsavasaṃbhāraṃ svasiddhucitavaibhavam Herrlichkeit, Pracht  KATHĀS. 90,91 . am Ende eines adj. comp. f. ā 38,124 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 132,a,1 . — vaibhavaḥ  MBH. 5,730  ist vai bhavaḥ.
